allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/function CircuitCanvas\({ a, b, c }: { a: boolean; b: boolean; c: boolean }\) {/function CircuitCanvas\({ a, b, c }: { a: boolean; b: boolean; c: boolean }\) {\\n  const theme = useTheme\(\);/' src/components/interactive/gate-builder.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/}, \\[a, b, c, andOut, orOut, notOut\\]\);/}, [a, b, c, andOut, orOut, notOut, theme]\);/' src/components/interactive/gate-builder.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/export function TransistorFieldIllustration\(\) {/export function TransistorFieldIllustration\(\) {\\n  const theme = useTheme\(\);/' src/components/interactive/transistor-field-illustration.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/export function GateFieldIllustration\(\) {/export function GateFieldIllustration\(\) {\\n  const theme = useTheme\(\);/' src/components/interactive/gate-field-illustration.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/function AdderCanvas\({ a, b, sum, carry }: { a: boolean; b: boolean; sum: boolean; carry: boolean }\) {/function AdderCanvas\({ a, b, sum, carry }: { a: boolean; b: boolean; sum: boolean; carry: boolean }\) {\\n  const theme = useTheme\(\);/' src/components/interactive/half-adder-demo.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/}, \\[a, b, sum, carry\\]\);/}, [a, b, sum, carry, theme]\);/' src/components/interactive/half-adder-demo.tsx)
